content: It is easier to store dietary fat as fat than it is to store dietary carbs.
When eating excess calories, the effect of carbohydrates is to be used for energy instead of being converted to fat.
In metabolic ward studies, the advantage of a ketogenic diet over a higher carb diet is not consistently observed due to inaccuracies in self-reported dietary intake.
There might be a very small metabolic inefficiency on extremely low-carb diets, causing a slight caloric deficit, but this is not common and is very small.
The main benefit of the ketogenic diet for weight loss is improved appetite regulation and sustainability of caloric deficit.
